abilities.name: Sand Damage
abilities.text: As long as Flygon ex is your Active Pokemon, put 1 damage counter on each of your opponent's Benched Basic Pokemon between turns.

attacks.name: Psychic Pulse
attacks.text: Does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokemon.

attacks.name: Super Sweep Up
attacks.text: Flip a coin. If heads, return 1 Energy card attached to the Defending Pokemon to your opponent's hand.

tests.name: sand_damage_between_turns
tests.description: Test Sand Damage puts 1 counter on Benched Basics

tests.name: psychic_pulse_bench_damage
tests.description: Test Psychic Pulse does 10 to all benched
